ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "agency_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the agency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agency's role and responsibilities */,
  "contact_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary contact person for the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the budget category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_years" (
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year_name" TEXT /* Name of the fiscal year (e.g., FY2017-18) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the fiscal year is open for transactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget allocation */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency receiving the budget */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget category */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year */,
  "allocated_amount" REAL /* Amount allocated in the budget */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the allocation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the allocation was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the allocation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES budget_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency making the expenditure */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget category */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year */,
  "expenditure_amount" REAL /* Amount of the expenditure */,
  "expenditure_date" TEXT /* Date of the expenditure */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the expenditure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the expenditure was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the expenditure */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES budget_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variances" (
  "variance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variance */,
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget allocation */,
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actual expenditure */,
  "variance_amount" REAL /* Amount of the variance */,
  "variance_type" TEXT /* Type of variance (e.g., over, under) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the variance entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the variance was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the variance entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variances_allocation_id FOREIGN KEY ("allocation_id") REFERENCES budget_allocations ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variances_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variances_expenditure_id FOREIGN KEY ("expenditure_id") REFERENCES expenditures ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variances_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency managing the project */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget category */,
  "grant_amount" REAL /* Total grant amount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the project was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year the project is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_projects_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES budget_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_projects_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_projects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project expenditure */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant project */,
  "expenditure_amount" REAL /* Amount of the expenditure */,
  "expenditure_date" TEXT /* Date of the expenditure */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the expenditure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the expenditure was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the expenditure */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_expenditures_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES grant_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_expenditures_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_expenditures_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, accountant, auditor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
